rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/29/20. Mailed and published notice must clearly indicate that the will is lost. No Declaration of Real Property has been filed yet. [LRSF 14.27 C.]
